# Creative Project NEW

> Berlin-based curatorial platform where artists develop contemporary photography, painting, and mixed-media projects with curator Olga Tarabukina.

Creative Project NEW pairs each artist with a curator over a long-term collaboration, guiding work from initial idea to public exhibition. Cohorts gather in Berlin for masterclasses, photowalks, group critiques, and joint exhibitions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform, the curator, and how the collaboration works.
- [Exhibition — STYX: Crossing Darkness Within](/exhibition): Current group exhibition at VOID INK, Berlin, 26 April – 31 May 2026.
- [Artist Team](/artists): Artists from the 2025 and 2025–26 cohorts.
- [Projects](/projects): Individual artist projects developed within the program.
- [Feedbacks and Reviews](/reviews): Reflections from past participants.
- [Contact](/contact): Inquiries about participation, collaboration, and projects.

## Optional

- [Imprint](/impressum)
